heading: Prerequisites
body:
To use PingOne as an IdP (Identity Provider) for Atlas, you must have:

- A PingOne subscription. To obtain a subscription, visit
  [PingOne](https://www.pingidentity.com/en/platform/solutions/pingone-for-workforce.html).

- A PingOne user with administrative privileges. To grant a user
  administrative privileges, see
  [Managing administrators](https://docs.pingidentity.com/r/en-us/pingone/p1_c_manage_administrators).
  Alternatively, you cam use the default administrative user created
  upon activation of your PingOne account.
